title: Crypto Tutorial
description: A beginner-friendly tutorial covering hashing, symmetric encryption, and asymmetric encryption.

modules.title: Hashing
modules.description: Learn what cryptographic hashes are, why they are one-way, and how they are used for integrity checks, password storage, and fingerprints of data.

sections.title: Hashing Algorithms and Security
sections.description: A concise video introduction to cryptographic hashing, collisions, and the security properties that make hash functions useful.

sections.title: Hashing Algorithm Overview: Types, Methodologies & Usage
sections.description: A beginner-friendly written guide explaining what hashing is, how hashing algorithms work, and where they are used in practice.

sections.title: hashlib - Secure hashes and message digests
sections.description: Official documentation for common hashing algorithms and a practical API for computing secure message digests.

sections.title: Cryptographic Hash Functions
sections.description: A hands-on tutorial showing how cryptographic hash functions work, with concrete examples and code snippets.

aditional-links.title: Hashing Algorithms and Security
aditional-links.description: A concise video introduction to cryptographic hashing, collisions, and the security properties that make hash functions useful.

aditional-links.title: hashlib - Secure hashes and message digests
aditional-links.description: Official documentation for common hashing algorithms and a practical API for computing secure message digests.

aditional-links.title: Cryptographic Hash Functions
aditional-links.description: A hands-on tutorial showing how cryptographic hash functions work, with concrete examples and code snippets.

modules.title: Symmetric Encryption
modules.description: Learn how one shared secret key is used to encrypt and decrypt data, and why symmetric encryption is fast and widely used.

sections.title: What is Symmetric Encryption? Simply Explained
sections.description: A short explainer video covering the core idea of shared-key encryption and when it is typically used.

sections.title: What is Symmetric Encryption?
sections.description: A clear written overview of symmetric encryption, how it works, and how it compares with asymmetric encryption.

sections.title: Fernet (symmetric encryption)
sections.description: Official documentation for a practical symmetric authenticated-encryption API built on standard cryptographic primitives.

sections.title: AES Encrypt / Decrypt - Examples
sections.description: A practical tutorial with code examples for AES encryption and decryption, including modern authenticated modes.

aditional-links.title: What is Symmetric Encryption? Simply Explained
aditional-links.description: A short explainer video covering the core idea of shared-key encryption and when it is typically used.

aditional-links.title: What is Symmetric Encryption?
aditional-links.description: A clear written overview of symmetric encryption, how it works, and how it compares with asymmetric encryption.

aditional-links.title: AES Encrypt / Decrypt - Examples
aditional-links.description: A practical tutorial with code examples for AES encryption and decryption, including modern authenticated modes.

modules.title: Asymmetric Encryption
modules.description: Understand public/private key pairs, how public-key encryption works, and why it is used for key exchange, encryption, and signatures.

sections.title: Public Key Cryptography
sections.description: A straightforward video explanation of the main idea behind public-key cryptography and asymmetric encryption.

sections.title: What is Asymmetric Encryption?
sections.description: A practical overview of public/private keys, digital signatures, key exchange, and common real-world uses.

sections.title: RSA
sections.description: Official documentation for RSA key generation, encryption, decryption, signing, and verification.

sections.title: RSA Encrypt / Decrypt - Examples
sections.description: A hands-on tutorial showing RSA key generation and RSA-OAEP encryption and decryption with working examples.
